subcodes.first_line: God doth testify that there is none other god beside Him; He is come in truth and hath revealed His clear and straight Path. Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for the revelation of Thy bounties
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو قد اتی بالحق و اظهر سبیله الواضح المستقیم لک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
